channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月07日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
item.description: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.

item.title: [未译] Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 23 killed in Kyiv region
item.description: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.

item.title: [未译] Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
item.description: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.

item.title: [未译] Wegovy weight loss pill now available in UK - here's what you need to know
item.description: The once-a-day pill, from the makers of the Wegovy weight-loss jab, can now be bought privately in UK pharmacies.

item.title: [未译] Asian Stocks to Gain, Samsung Slides After Profit: Markets Wrap
item.description: Stocks in Asia are poised to edge higher after a rally in several US technology giants revived confidence that the AI-driven bull market still has room to run.

item.title: [未译] Canada to buy 12 hi-tech German submarines after bidding war
item.description: TKMS beats South Korean rival to multibillion-dollar contract that will deepen Canada’s Nato tiesCanada has selected a German consortium to build a dozen cutting-edge submarines in one of the country’

item.title: [未译] Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern
item.description: Oil held a drop on signs of growing oversupply, with Saudi Arabia slashing prices and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up.

item.title: [未译] Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
item.description: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.

item.title: [未译] A Speed Limit for Computers
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/iztgtd/speed_limit_for_computers">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] ‘Restraining order needed’: Trump shares doctored Meloni meme to reignite feud
item.description: On the eve of a key NATO summit, Donald Trump reignited his feud with Italy's Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni by sharing a doctored image on Truth Social, captioned “restraining order needed.” The alter

item.title: [未译] Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court
item.description: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad

item.title: [未译] 'I ate ketchup and cheese,' says Venezuelan girl trapped under quake rubble for 32 hours
item.description: Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June.

item.title: [未译] 'I wear it on my middle finger': The rise of the defiant divorce ring
item.description: Around the world women are marking their split with new - or repurposed engagement - rings.

item.title: [未译] Banks accused of failing most vulnerable customers
item.description: Homeless people or those in financial hardship have been pushed to online applications and away from basic bank accounts.

item.title: [未译] Intel-Backed AI Chip and Software Maker Syntiant Files for IPO
item.description: Syntiant Corp., a company making semiconductors and software for artificial intelligence, filed for an initial public offering to tap investors’ enthusiasm for the technology.

item.title: [未译] Can China repeat its EV success with robotaxis?
item.description: China's self-driving car firms have been given a headstart by the country's EV supply chain as they expand globally.

item.title: [未译] Japan Drives Asia Offshore Bonds to Record, Surpassing China Era
item.description: Japanese borrowers drove quarterly issuance in Asia Pacific’s offshore bond market to a record, eclipsing the previous peak set during an era of Chinese corporate dominance.

item.title: [未译] Hamilton Lane Raises $3.8 Billion Fund Targeting Mid-Market Private Equity Deals
item.description: Erik Hirsch, Co-CEO at Hamilton Lane, discussed the firm's recent $3.8 billion fundraise aimed at co-investing alongside private equity in mid-market companies. Hirsch emphasized the focus on smaller

item.title: [未译] Rivian Offers 75 Million Shares to Meet US Energy Loan Terms
item.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. is offering to sell 75 million shares as the electric vehicle company seeks to fund equity contributions related to a US Department of Energy loan.

item.title: [未译] Hedge Funds Turn Most Negative on the Japanese Yen Since 2007
item.description: Hedge funds turned the most negative on the yen since 2007 as the currency trades near its weakest level in four decades.

item.title: [未译] The Download: a smoking “endgame” and a new Elizabeth Bear story
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The UK’s generational tobacco ban might not work.

item.title: [未译] Your family’s $300 stake in OpenAI
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s oft-discussed promise that Americans w

item.title: [未译] ITV hits such as I'm a Celebrity to stay free to watch after Sky takeover
item.description: Sky boss Dana Strong's comments came as the channel announces it is buying ITV's media and entertainment divisions in a £1.6bn deal.

item.title: [未译] France’s Macron in Syria on first post-Assad visit by a Western leader
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron arrived in Damascus on Monday for the first visit by a Western European head of state since Syria’s new authorities took power. President Ahmed al-Sharaa has been rebo

item.title: [未译] China Test Fires Long-Range Ballistic Missile in the Pacific
item.description: China’s firing of a submarine-launched missile came as Australia secured more defense deals with Pacific Island nations. Countries expressed concern about the test.

item.title: [未译] Backlash after China bubble tea firm ordered to pay Louis Vuitton $1.5m
item.description: A court in China ruled that Molly Tea had infringed on the luxury brand's four-petal flower design.

item.title: [未译] Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder
item.description: Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA.

item.title: [未译] More than 1,000 arrested as part of global human trafficking crackdown
item.description: Interpol says the vast majority of the 2,070 victims or potential victims identified were women being trafficked for sex.

item.title: [未译] Death toll from Venezuela quakes rises to 3,535 as more than 17,000 left homeless
item.description: The death toll from the back-to-back earthquakes that hit Venezuela on June 24 has risen to 3,535, official figures released on Monday showed. More than 17,000 people have been left homeless by the tw

item.title: [未译] Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
item.description: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.
